scope: One bounded 31B Q4_K_M offload practical local-fallback cell; LM Studio local only; hard stop after one cell.
sourceTruthReadBeforeLoad: scripts/run-matrix.mjs timeout wiring for load and eval subprocesses
live git pull --ff-only / git status --short / lms ps / nvidia-smi

runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 189 MiB used, 7799 MiB free, 6% utilization

command: EVAL_USE_PROMPTFOO=false; EVAL_TASK_FILTER=build-synthetic-smoke; EVAL_SMOKE_MODELS=google/gemma-4-31b; EVAL_SMOKE_PROFILES=gpu_offload; EVAL_CELL_TIMEOUT_MS=300000; node scripts/run-matrix.mjs --smoke
hardStopRule: Exactly one google/gemma-4-31b gpu_offload practical cell was run. No partial/full profile, no 31B-QAT, no 26B or mid-size model, no extra task, and no retry was attempted.

timeoutWiring.loadModel: spawnSync lms load uses timeout: EVAL_CELL_TIMEOUT_MS when set.
timeoutWiring.evalCell: spawnSync eval/local-fallback subprocess uses timeout: EVAL_CELL_TIMEOUT_MS when set.
timeoutWiring.unload: Runner calls lms unload --all after the row; Stream 32 also performed explicit unload verification because the model stayed IDLE after the cell.

promptfooLatest.reason: The completed local-fallback row refreshed promptfoo-latest.json with the Stream 32 build-synthetic-smoke output.

comparisonArtifacts.reason: The cell completed and promptfoo-latest.json points to Stream 32, so compare and queue archives are tied to this row rather than a stale surface.

stream16Comparison.priorState: Stream 16 had only estimate-timeout evidence for google/gemma-4-31b Q4_K_M: gpu_full, gpu_partial_0.35, and gpu_offload estimate-only probes each timed out at 120000 ms, so no practical 31B Q4 cell was attempted.
stream16Comparison.practicalDelta: Stream 32 moves google/gemma-4-31b Q4_K_M from estimate-timeout-only to one direct bounded practical gpu_offload success row.

stream25Comparison.priorState: Stream 25 google/gemma-4-31b-qat@gpu_offload timed out at 300031 ms with no pass totals.
stream25Comparison.practicalDelta: The non-QAT 31B Q4_K_M offload row completed the same local-fallback build-synthetic-smoke task 1/1 in 262464 ms, while 31B-QAT remains timeout-only.

runtimeAfterBeforeUnload.lmsPs: google/gemma-4-31b was IDLE at 19.89 GB, context 4096, device Local, TTL 10m / 10m.

settled.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 247 MiB used, 7741 MiB free, 1% utilization after a short wait.

gapOutcome: This closes or sharpens only the narrow 31B Q4_K_M practical-evidence gap: there is now one direct bounded gpu_offload local-fallback success row after Stream 16 estimate-only timeouts. It does not prove broad 31B readiness, partial/full placement, Promptfoo no-cache throughput, user-accepted quality, or final 3-solid promotion.
remainingGaps: Broad/full local matrix coverage remains incomplete.
Qwen full 40-case no-cache current-suite throughput remains incomplete.
31B Q4_K_M has only one offload local-fallback success row; no partial/full or broad quality proof exists.
31B-QAT remains timeout-only for practical evidence after partial and offload attempts.
Final two-verifier completion audit remains pending.
